main.description: Declares structured automation metadata for an account, complementing the coarse global 'bot' self-label with richer disclosure for clients, discovery, and moderation.

class.description: Primary category of automation for this account.

operator.description: Optional DID of the human, organization, or service account responsible for operating this automated account.

purpose.description: Optional plain-language description of the account's purpose and expected behavior.

interactionMode.description: How this automated account interacts with other users.

humanSupervision.description: Whether and how a human reviews or supervises the account's behavior.

createdAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp indicating when this automation declaration was first created.

updatedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp indicating when this automation declaration was last updated.
